args.query:
SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(Op.OwnerId,'#','')) AS OwnerId_clean, AVG(DATE_DIFF('day', DATE(Op.CreatedDate), DATE(C.CompanySignedDate))) AS avg_days
FROM Opportunity Op
JOIN Contract C ON TRIM(REPLACE(Op.ContractID__c,'#','')) = TRIM(REPLACE(C.Id,'#',''))
WHERE DATE(Op.CreatedDate) >= DATE('2023-04-01')
  AND DATE(Op.CreatedDate) < DATE('2023-05-01')
  AND C.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY OwnerId_clean
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(Op.OwnerId,'#','')) AS OwnerId_clean, AVG(DATE_DIFF('day', DATE(Op.CreatedDate), DATE(C.CompanySignedDate))) AS avg_days
FROM Opportunity Op
JOIN Contract C ON TRIM(REPLACE(Op.ContractID__c,'#','')) = TRIM(REPLACE(C.Id,'#',''))
WHERE DATE(Op.CreatedDate) >= DATE('2023-04-01')
  AND DATE(Op.CreatedDate) < DATE('2023-05-01')
  AND C.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY OwnerId_clean
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;
